description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the master branch and on all pull requests. Use a matrix job that tests on Ubuntu, MacOS, and Windows with multiple Python versions, excluding Windows with Python 3.6. For each job, check out the code, set up the specified Python version, install Poetry, configure it, set up caching, ensure the cache is healthy, install dependencies, generate code from proto files, and execute the test suite with pytest.
